# Ledger Coverage Matrix (Phase 1)

Per-item layer grades joining `coverage-ledger.json` against the endpoint / workflow / fe-route matrices.
`be-unit`/`contract`/`e2e` graded mechanically; `fe-unit` = UNKNOWN here (Phase 1 FE fan-out resolves it).
Only confident `MISSING` required layers count as GAPs.

## Item grades

| Grade | Count | Meaning |
|-------|------:|---------|
| COVERED | 201 | all required layers proven (be/contract/e2e) |
| PARTIAL | 522 | no confident MISSING, but ≥1 UNKNOWN (mostly fe-unit / no-endpoint be-unit) |
| **GAP** | **192** | ≥1 required layer confidently MISSING — the backlog |
| DEFERRED | 0 | absent-by-design (WF-P05 / V-XRI-003 / BR-031) |

## GAP backlog by severity

Severity precedence: `unproven` (NO layer covers the behavior — critical) > `e2e-gap` (unit/contract proves it but the user workflow has no end-to-end proof) > `be-unit-gap` (covered elsewhere, no bun unit test) > `fe-unit-gap` > `contract-only` (often a deliberate "integration-tested instead" choice — see dental-billing.hurl:595).

| severity | GAPs |
|----------|-----:|
| unproven | 3 |
| e2e-gap | 14 |
| be-unit-gap | 4 |
| fe-unit-gap | 0 |
| contract-only | 36 |

## Backend / orphan-endpoint GAPs (135) — NOT user-reachable

No dentalemon FE consumes these (all endpoints are `disposition: orphan`, mostly the upstream Stripe `billing` template vs the live `dental-billing`). They are the endpoint-matrix orphan ratchet's domain, not the user-workflow north star. Listed for completeness, deprioritized.
